content: Homoglyph/charset abuse: Unicode UTS#39 Security Mechanisms. confusables.txt (~6565 chars) maps visually-similar chars (Cyrillic a->a, Greek o->o). Skeleton algorithm reduces a string to a canonical confusable skeleton for comparison. Mixed-script detection flags strings combining multiple Unicode scripts inappropriately (whole-script and mixed-script confusables). For spam: signals are mixed-script content, high ratio of confusable/non-NFC chars, emoji/zero-width abuse. Rust: unicode-security crate implements UTS#39 mixed_script + confusable skeleton; unicode-script for script detection. Low-confidence as a standalone signal (legit multilingual users); use as a weak weighted feature.
